response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The Reference JSON confirmed no vocal music was performed (contains_vocal_music is false) and provided no lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: Because the Reference JSON was null for lyrics, 100% manual transcription and translation of the spoken Japanese and English dialogue was conducted. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were matched with high precision to the rapid conversation and comedic timing between Hoshimachi Suisei and Mori Calliope. No on-screen visual text overlays were prioritized over the primary vocal dialogue.

subtitles.original: 一緒に歌わせてもらいましたね。
subtitles.english: We got to sing together, didn't we?

subtitles.original: 懐かしい。
ねえ、懐かしい。これ、なんかこんなんもやってなくない？
subtitles.english: Right, so nostalgic. Didn't we also do something like this?

subtitles.original: やりました。たくさんやりました。
subtitles.english: We did. We did it a lot.

subtitles.original: やったよね。
やばいよね、めっちゃいい思い出ですよね。
subtitles.english: That's crazy, it's such a great memory.

subtitles.original: 覚えてくれたね、それ。
ね、久しぶりに歌えて嬉しいね。
subtitles.english: Right, I'm glad we could sing it again after a long time.

subtitles.original: 懐かしいポイント。
ありがとう。
そうですね、今回「Caramel Pain」一緒に歌いました。一番好きな星街すいせい曲です！
subtitles.english: Yes, we sang "Caramel Pain" together this time. It's my favorite Hoshimachi Suisei song!

subtitles.original: わあ！嬉しい！
イェーイ、やった。
めっちゃいい感じだったね、ハモリとかもね。
subtitles.english: It felt really good, the harmonies and everything too.

subtitles.original: たくさん練習しました。
ねえ、本当に綺麗だったぜ。
ありがとうございます。
ちなみに、ほら、ピカピカストーン。
subtitles.english: By the way, look, the sparkling stones.

subtitles.original: おお、わお、ビューティフル！
うん、素敵ですよね。
素敵。
え、すいせい先輩、あの私知ってるけど、誕生日はいつですか？
subtitles.english: Um, Suisei-senpai, I already know, but when is your birthday?

subtitles.original: 私は3月の22。
March.
そうですね。
先月、先月...
そう、先月。
です。
ですので、ほら、アクアマリンが誕生石...
subtitles.english: So, you see, aquamarine is the birthstone...

subtitles.original: アクアマリンだ！
もうぴったりよね。私知らなかったよ、自分の誕生石アクアマリンって。
subtitles.english: It's a perfect match. I didn't know my birthstone was aquamarine.

subtitles.original: そう、ぴったりですよ。マジで最高。
subtitles.english: Yes, it's perfect. Seriously the best.

subtitles.original: ねえ、同じ色だよ。もう。
subtitles.english: Right, it's the same color. Really.

subtitles.original: 同じ色。最高だぜ。
めっちゃ素敵ですよ。
めっちゃ綺麗だから、一緒に写真撮りましょう！
subtitles.english: It's so beautiful, let's take a picture together!

subtitles.original: あ、撮ろう。
いいですか？レッツゴー。
イェーイ。
私ね、やりたいものある。
subtitles.english: I have something I want to do.

subtitles.original: オッケー。
これ、分かる？何のポーズか。
subtitles.english: Do you know what pose this is?

subtitles.original: No. ジョジョじゃない？
違うよ。
What is this?
Gold on Belt!
そう！
これめちゃめちゃいいよね。
ありがとう。Thank you so much. え、ちゃんと見てくれた、ありがとう。
subtitles.english: Thank you. Thank you so much. Oh, you watched it properly, thank you.

subtitles.original: もちろん！大好きな曲ですよ。
subtitles.english: Of course! It's a song I love.

subtitles.original: Thank you so much, senpai.
え、ちなみに、Everybody really quick, before we keep going, おしらせあります！
subtitles.english: Oh, by the way, everybody really quick, before we keep going, we have an announcement!

subtitles.original: Yes, quick announcement about members only.
subtitles.english: Yes, quick announcement about members only.

subtitles.original: メンバー限定アンコールがありますよ。
subtitles.english: There will be a members-only encore!

subtitles.original: やったー！
A solo session, and we need to pick one song that I just performed with the amazing guests, and, uh, I'm gonna do a solo version of it.
subtitles.english: A solo session, and we need to pick one song that I just performed with the amazing guests, and, uh, I'm gonna do a solo version of it.

subtitles.original: Yes, so you have one minute starting now. 1分ありますよ、vote. あの、カリオペはソロで歌いますよ。さっきゲストと一緒に歌った曲。
subtitles.english: Yes, so you have one minute starting now. You have 1 minute, vote. Um, Calliope will sing it solo. The song I just sang with the guest.

subtitles.original: Please vote, everybody, you have one minute, go!
subtitles.english: Please vote, everybody, you have one minute, go!

subtitles.original: 1分ね。この後のメン限でソロで歌ってくれるらしいですよ。
subtitles.english: 1 minute. Apparently she'll sing it solo in the members-only stream after this.

subtitles.original: えー、全部聴きたいよー！
subtitles.english: Eh, I want to hear them all!

subtitles.original: そうだね、全部めちゃめちゃいい曲、すべての曲。
subtitles.english: Right, they are all very, very good songs, all of them.

subtitles.original: ねえ、やばいよ。
But only one.
ねえ、1曲だけですよ。選んでくださいね。
subtitles.english: Right, only one song. Please choose, okay?

subtitles.original: 選んでね。Please, お願いします。
subtitles.english: Please choose. Please, I beg you.

subtitles.original: どれがいいかな、どれがいいかな。
subtitles.english: Which one is good, which one is good?

subtitles.original: Okay, お願いします。あ、楽しみ。頑張ります。
subtitles.english: Okay, please. Oh, I'm looking forward to it. I'll do my best.

subtitles.original: ねえ。
いや、カリオペ本当にね、4...4年。メジャーデビューして4年。
subtitles.english: Well, Calliope really, 4... 4 years. 4 years since major debut.

subtitles.original: 本当に駆け抜けてきたよね。
subtitles.english: You've really run through it all, haven't you?

subtitles.original: そう、いろいろやってますよ。
subtitles.english: Yes, I'm doing all kinds of things.

subtitles.original: ねえ。なんかアニメのタイアップとかもね、たくさん決まって。
subtitles.english: Right. And you've gotten a lot of anime tie-ins and things too.

subtitles.original: 来ました、来ました。
ねえ、嬉しい。
So, my dream...
そうですね、夢が叶った。
subtitles.english: That's right, my dream came true.

subtitles.original: ねえ、すごい。めっちゃ嬉しい。
ありがとう、皆さんのおかげで。
素敵な先輩のおかげでも。My inspiration. Thank you so much, everybody!
subtitles.english: And also thanks to my wonderful senpai. My inspiration. Thank you so much, everybody!

subtitles.original: イェーイ、最高。
So, let's keep shooting for the moon.
subtitles.english: So, let's keep shooting for the moon.

subtitles.original: そうだよ。
Let's see. Okay, well, everybody is writing what they want...
subtitles.english: Let's see. Okay, well, everybody is writing what they want...

subtitles.original: おお、すごいすごい。今好きな曲...
subtitles.english: Oh, amazing, amazing. Currently, your favorite song...

subtitles.original: おお、すごいすごい。
そうだよね、すごい。Many, many, many...
お、投票が？
Go, go, go! Choose, choose, choose! 選んで、選んで。
subtitles.english: Go, go, go! Choose, choose, choose! Choose, choose.

subtitles.original: 選んだ？始まってる？
subtitles.english: Did you choose? Has it started?

subtitles.original: 投票難しくない？長めにやりますってよ。
subtitles.english: Isn't voting hard? They say they'll keep it open a bit longer.

subtitles.original: うん、オッケー。A little bit longer.
subtitles.english: Yeah, okay. A little bit longer.
